mapper.select: SELECT mac_address, target_mac, alias, has_permission, creator, create_date, updater, update_date FROM ai_device_address_book WHERE mac_address = #{macAddress} ORDER BY update_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_device_address_book (mac_address, target_mac, alias, has_permission, creator, create_date, updater, update_date) VALUES (#{macAddress}, #{targetMac}, #{alias}, #{hasPermission}, #{creator}, NOW(), #{updater}, NOW())
